etymology.description: 隹(隹) (zhuī, "short-tailed bird") -> 唯(唯) (wéi, "only") + 口(口) (kǒu, "mouth") added -> 鳥(鳥) (niǎo, "bird") added as semantic -> 鷕
etymology.interpretation: The character 鷕 (yǎo, "cry of a bird") combines the phonetic element 唯(唯) (wéi, "only") with the semantic component 鳥(鳥) (niǎo, "bird") to indicate the sound associated with a bird's cry.
